title: TrezzWorld Studio Master Document
summary: Shared blueprint for studio.trezzhaus.com, trezzworld-studio-production, and the TrezzWorld Production Studio runtime.
mission: Turn prompts into launch-ready Roblox experiences and studio operations using a shared master layer.

workstreams.name: Studio Creator
workstreams.focus: Prompt-to-experience generation, Luau packaging, live Studio sync, and publishing workflow.

workstreams.name: Launch & Deployment
workstreams.focus: Shared env/master-file support, deployment smoke tests, and Railway rollout.

workstreams.name: Brand & Platform
workstreams.focus: Brand catalogs, franchise systems, launch strategy, and partnership playbooks.

workstreams.name: Master Layer
workstreams.focus: Unified document ingestion, repo mapping, and cross-repo handoff for production use.

capabilities: Studio live sync and publishing workflows
Monetization setup and Roblox Open Cloud integration
launchChecklist: Confirm the shared master document is reachable from the deployment environment.
Validate the Roblox OAuth, publishing, and monetization flow before public launch.
Keep the master layer aligned with studio.trezzhaus.com and trezzworld-studio-production rollout plans.
